title: Magical Chicken Mole
description: A twist on the classic Mexican dish using magical ingredients. Rich flavors and tender chicken make this a standout meal.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and sear the chicken until browned on both sides.
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and cover with magical mole sauce.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
Meanwhile, sauté the diced poblano peppers in a skillet until tender.
Stir in chopped cal cilantro and cook for an additional minute.
Serve the chicken topped with sautéed poblanos, low-cal cheese (if using), and a dollop of mexican crema (if using).
